Notes: UW-L Holiday Inn Express Thanksgiving Tournament Third-Place Game...
North Central never trails in 1st half, leads 11-10, goes on 11-1 run...
Finlandia cuts lead to 50-46 w/ 7:25 left, North Central goes on 14-4 run...
Game.Officials: Scott Doberstein,  John Horn,  Taylor DeValk
